text.title: Spike Protocol Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Spike Protocol Template output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: next story, discard, or RFC reference

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: spike_id populated with a typed value
question populated with a typed value
time_box_days populated with a typed value
exit_criteria populated with a typed value
outcome_doc_url populated with a typed value
follow_up_action populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
